blended.narrative: Searchmont Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
